text:
Market today: Tech is still the driver, but sentiment is shaky. Headlines about AI spending and a semiconductor-related ban are key.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL/TRIM candidate at -29.46% due to its leveraged nature and current status. SPAL is also a concern at -34.41% for similar reasons.

Watch: Keep an eye on AVGO's setup. It's a strong technical candidate with a clear entry and stop.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and watching for actionable tech catalysts.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming exposure given the SELL status and -29.46% PnL.
SPAL: Evaluate reducing position size due to SELL status and -34.41% PnL.
AVGO: Watch for entry near 393.18-392.78 with stop at 390.7.
